item.title: 受巴西丰收预期提振，罗布斯塔咖啡价格逼近七个月低点
item.description: 罗布斯塔咖啡价格在跌至七个月低点后趋于稳定，此前市场预期巴西高端阿拉比卡咖啡豆产量将创下纪录，这可能缓解对价格较低的罗布斯塔咖啡豆的需求。【原文：Robusta coffee steadied after falling to a seven-month low on expectations of record Brazilian output of high-end arabica beans, which could ease demand for the cheaper variety.】

item.title: 亚德尼对备受推崇的逆向投资股票买入信号持怀疑态度
item.description: 上周末股市的氛围，正是逆向投资者梦寐以求的那种。【原文：The mood in the stock market by the end of last week was the type of stuff that contrarian investors dream about.】

item.title: 美国工业生产因工厂和采矿业产出增加而上升
item.description: 受制造业和采矿业产出连续第二个月增长的提振，美国2月份工业生产小幅上升。【原文：US industrial production rose modestly in February, lifted by a second month of gains in manufacturing and mining output.】

item.title: LSEG启动美国高评级美元债券发行以进行债务再融资
item.description: 伦敦证券交易所集团已启动美元债券发行，旨在为债务再融资，这也使得投资级债券市场今日的发行规模预计将十分庞大。【原文：London Stock Exchange Group Plc has kicked off the sale of US dollar bonds as it looks to refinance debt, adding to what is set to be a heavy day of issuance in the investment-grade debt market.】

item.title: 花旗聘请摩根士丹利的法里纳担任基础设施融资联席主管
item.description: 据彭博新闻社查阅的一份备忘录显示，花旗集团已聘请摩根士丹利银行家埃里克·法里纳担任基础设施融资与资本解决方案全球联席主管。【原文：Citigroup Inc. has hired Morgan Stanley banker Eric Farina as global co-head of infrastructure financing and capital solutions, according to a memo reviewed by Bloomberg News.】

item.title: 贝森特称美国未干预能源衍生品市场
item.description: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，尽管中东冲突导致原油期货价格升至近四年来的最高点，但美国并未干预能源衍生品市场。【原文：The US has not intervened in energy derivatives markets, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said, after the Middle East conflict pushed crude futures to the highest in almost four years.】

item.title: Peloton推出专为健身房设计的商用健身车和跑步机
item.description: Peloton Interactive Inc. 推出了一款专为健身房设计的新款健身车和跑步机，这是该公司为兑现长期承诺的业务转型所做的最新努力。【原文：Peloton Interactive Inc. introduced a new bike and treadmill designed to be used in gyms, its latest effort to deliver on a long-promised turnaround.】

item.title: 油价飙升令旅游前景蒙上阴影，加勒比地区债券价格下跌
item.description: 伊朗战争引发的油价飙升正对中美洲和加勒比地区的主权债务市场产生连锁反应，这些地区经济高度依赖旅游业，因此尤其容易受到燃料成本上涨的影响。【原文：A surge in oil prices triggered by the war in Iran is rippling through sovereign debt markets in Central America and the Caribbean, where economies that depend heavily on tourism are particularly vulnerable to higher fuel costs.】

item.title: 萨科齐就那起载入法国史册的监禁案发起法律诉讼
item.description: 法国前总统尼古拉·萨科齐已就其涉嫌卷入与已故利比亚领导人穆阿迈尔·卡扎菲政权有关的选举资金丑闻一事，针对可能再次入狱的判决展开了法律抗争。【原文：Former French President Nicolas Sarkozy has started his court fight against a return to prison for his alleged role in an electoral funding scandal linked to late Libyan leader Moammar Qaddafi’s regime.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发的战略要道封锁开始引发对全球芯片供应的担忧
item.description: 随着中东战争进入第三周，全球半导体行业正面临日益加剧的威胁：这场冲突可能切断芯片制造所需的关键供应链，并导致台湾地区的电力成本飙升——而台湾正是当今科技产业的基石。【原文：As the war in the Middle East stretches into a third week, the global semiconductor industry is facing mounting threats the conflict will choke off key supplies vital for chipmaking and spike the cost of power in Taiwan — the foundation of today’s technology industry.】

item.title: 伊朗战事动荡冲击新加坡船用燃料供应商
item.description: 中东地区冲突的不断升级导致船用燃料价格剧烈波动并大幅上涨，促使作为全球最大船用燃料补给枢纽的新加坡的经销商们削减了采购量。【原文：A widening conflict in the Middle East has led to dramatic swings and surges in the price of fuel for ships, prompting distributors in Singapore, the world’s top bunkering hub, to cut back their purchases.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡危机的“次优解决方案”仍遥遥无期
item.description: 美国已承诺确保船只安全通行，并要求其他国家提供协助。但目前几乎没有采取任何行动的迹象。【原文：The US has pledged to ensure ships’ safe passage and is demanding other nations assist. But there’s little sign of any action.】

item.title: 受基数效应影响，加拿大通胀率放缓至1.8%
item.description: 随着销售税减免措施不再纳入年度同比计算，加拿大上个月的通胀率降幅超出预期。【原文：Canada’s inflation rate slowed by more than expected last month after a sales tax break rolled out of yearly comparisons.】

item.title: 美国银行签约租赁纽约市“One Bryant Park”整栋办公楼
item.description: 美国银行正计划在曼哈顿中城的“布莱恩特公园一号”进行大规模扩张，该行目前已是该地标性建筑的主力租户。【原文：Bank of America Corp. is plotting a major expansion at One Bryant Park in midtown Manhattan, where it’s already the anchor tenant.】

item.title: 纽约制造业活动停滞，通胀预期有所缓解
item.description: 受出货量下降拖累，纽约州3月份的工厂活动陷入停滞，不过制造商预计未来几个月通胀带来的压力将有所缓解。【原文：New York state factory activity stalled in March, dragged down by a decline in shipments, though manufacturers expect less strain from inflation in the months ahead.】

item.title: 壳牌预计液化天然气需求将持续增长，尽管伊朗局势动荡
item.description: 壳牌公司认为，尽管中东冲突导致价格波动，但凭借其灵活性和可靠性，液化天然气的全球长期需求仍将持续增长。【原文：Shell Plc sees long-term global demand for liquefied natural gas continuing to grow because of its flexibility and reliability, even as the conflict in the Middle East brings volatility to prices.】

item.title: 油轮穿越霍尔木兹海峡，美股期货上涨
item.description: 随着投资者对霍尔木兹海峡长期封锁可能影响全球供应链的担忧有所缓解，美国股市周一有望上涨。【原文：US stocks are set to rise Monday as investor concerns that the prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz would impact global supply chains abate.】

item.title: 欧洲人批评德韦弗呼吁与俄罗斯关系正常化
item.description: 欧洲官员严厉批评了比利时首相巴特·德韦弗提出的呼吁，即与俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京达成协议，以结束乌克兰战争并恢复廉价俄罗斯能源向欧洲的供应。【原文：European officials slammed a call by Belgian Prime Minister Bart de Wever to cut a deal with Russia’s Vladimir Putin to end the war in Ukraine and resume the flow of cheap Russian energy to Europe.】

item.title: 摩根大通启动与EA收购案相关的57.5亿美元贷款发售
item.description: 以摩根大通为首的华尔街银行启动了一笔57.5亿美元的跨境杠杆贷款发行，旨在为收购视频游戏制造商艺电公司（Electronic Arts Inc.）提供资金支持，这是同类交易中规模最大的之一。【原文：Wall Street banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. kicked off a $5.75 billion cross-border leveraged loan sale to help finance the buyout of video game maker Electronic Arts Inc., one of the largest transactions of its kind.】

item.title: 富达投资支持的人工智能芯片散热公司Frore在最新一轮融资中估值达16.4亿美元
item.description: 专注于人工智能芯片液冷技术的Frore Systems公司完成了一笔1.43亿美元的融资，此轮融资使该初创企业的估值达到16.4亿美元。【原文：Frore Systems Inc., which makes liquid cooling technology for AI chips, raised $143 million in a funding deal that values the startup at $1.64 billion.】

item.title: 特朗普对伊朗的战争及其关税政策面临历史包袱
item.description: 美国总统正在将他的战争带来的经济和政治双重冲击，叠加在他此前实施的关税政策之上。【原文：The US president is layering the joint economic and political shock of his war on top of that of his tariffs.】

item.title: 国际清算银行称，白银暴跌因“破坏稳定的”杠杆ETF热潮而加剧
item.description: 据国际清算银行称，1月底白银市场遭遇了史上最严重的抛售，而散户投资者在杠杆型交易所交易基金中的参与度日益增加，进一步加剧了这一抛售潮。【原文：The worst silver sell-off in history at the end of January was accelerated by the growing footprint of retail investors in leveraged exchange-traded funds, according to the Bank for International Settlements.】

item.title: 国际清算银行警告称，若伊朗冲突持续，将引发经济风险
item.description: 国际清算银行警告称，中东地区若爆发长期战争并导致通胀预期失控，最终可能引发金融市场动荡和财政困境。【原文：A prolonged war in the Middle East that dislodges inflation expectations could ultimately result in financial-market fallout and fiscal trouble, the Bank for International Settlements warned.】

item.title: 国际清算银行表示，对特殊目的机构（SRTs）进行压力测试或有助于揭示相关风险
item.description: 根据国际清算银行发表的一份报告，金融监管机构应考虑将合成风险转移纳入全系统压力测试，以便更好地评估此类工具带来的潜在风险。【原文：Financial watchdogs should consider including synthetic risk transfers in system-wide stress tests to better assess potential risks from the instruments, according to a paper published by the Bank for International Settlements.】

item.title: AI超大规模企业的影子借贷加剧了私募信贷风险
item.description: 据国际清算银行官员称，通过表外债务对人工智能基础设施的投资，正使保险公司和私募信贷基金对超大规模科技企业的风险敞口不断增加。【原文：Investment in AI infrastructure via off-balance sheet debt is increasing the exposure of insurers and private credit funds to hyperscalers, according to officials at the Bank for International Settlements.】

item.title: 爱尔兰的哈里斯表示，欧盟储蓄联盟有望在今年筹备就绪
item.description: 爱尔兰财政部长表示，他相信，经过成员国之间多年关于运作方式的争论，这一期待已久的、规模达数万亿欧元的欧洲储蓄与投资联盟即将达成协议。【原文：Ireland’s Finance Minister said he is confident a long-awaited multi-trillion-euro European saving and investments union is close to getting over the line after years of sparring between member states over how it would work.】

item.title: 巴西通胀预期在利率决议前夕大幅攀升
item.description: 巴西经济学家上调了今年通胀率和基准利率的预测，这在央行决策者即将决定借贷成本的前几天，为货币政策前景增添了不确定性。【原文：Brazil economists raised their inflation and benchmark interest rate forecasts for this year, adding tension to the monetary policy outlook just days before central bankers decide on borrowing costs.】

item.title: 阿波罗正就以40亿欧元估值收购Syntegon的股权进行谈判
item.description: 知情人士透露，阿波罗全球管理公司（Apollo Global Management Inc.）正就收购Syntegon的重大少数股权进行谈判。Syntegon是一家由CVC Capital Partners Plc持有的德国包装机械制造商。【原文：Apollo Global Management Inc. is in talks to buy a significant minority stake in Syntegon, the German packaging machine maker owned by CVC Capital Partners Plc, people with knowledge of the matter said.】

item.title: 美国盘前领涨股：Meta、National Storage、Sable Offshore
item.description: 截至纽约时间上午7点50分，标普500指数期货上涨0.8%；受市场预期将有更多油轮能够通过霍尔木兹海峡的提振，油价涨幅收窄。【原文：S&P 500 Index futures rise 0.8% as of 7:50 a.m. in New York and oil prices reversed an advance on hopes that more tankers could traverse the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 塞内加尔通过大规模区域借贷为解决债务危机争取了时间
item.description: 投资者和分析师表示，塞内加尔对快速增长的区域债务市场的依赖，既缓解了非洲风险最高信贷所面临的压力，同时也推迟了关于债务重组的讨论。【原文：Senegal’s reliance on a fast-growing regional debt market is easing pressure on Africa’s riskiest credit while delaying discussions about debt restructuring, investors and analysts say.】
